Class Library

java.lang.Object
Library
public class Library extends Object
Stores and manages all media entries in the user's library.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Library()

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addAnime(Anime input, int initialStatus)
    Adds an Anime to the library.
    void

    Adds a MusicAlbum to the library.

    Adds a MusicSingle to the library.

    Adds a TVSeries to the library.

    Adds a VideoGame to the library.

    Displays all entries across every media type.
    void

    Prints a summary of library stats including counts and average rating.

    Displays only entries that match the given status.

    Displays only entries of the given media type.

    Removes a VideoGame from the library.

  • Constructor Details

    • Library

      public Library()

  • Method Details

    • addAnime

      public void addAnime(Anime input, int initialStatus)
      Adds an Anime to the library.
      Parameters:
      input - the Anime object to add
      initialStatus - the starting status (0=Planned, 1=In Progress) Pre-condition: Input is a valid Anime object, initialStatus is 0 or 1. Post-condition: The anime is added to the library with the specified status.

    • addTVSeries

      public void addTVSeries(TVSeries input, int initialStatus)
      Adds a TVSeries to the library.
      Parameters:
      input - the TVSeries object to add
      initialStatus - the starting status (0=Planned, 1=In Progress) Pre-condition: Input is a valid TVSeries object, initialStatus is 0 or 1. Post-condition: The TV series is added to the library with the specified status.

    • addMusicSingle

      public void addMusicSingle(MusicSingle input, int initialStatus)
      Adds a MusicSingle to the library.
      Parameters:
      input - the MusicSingle object to add
      initialStatus - the starting status (0=Planned, 1=In Progress) Pre-condition: Input is a valid MusicSingle object, initialStatus is 0 or 1. Post-condition: The music single is added to the library with the specified status.

    • addMusicAlbum

      public void addMusicAlbum(MusicAlbum input, int initialStatus)
      Adds a MusicAlbum to the library.
      Parameters:
      input - the MusicAlbum object to add
      initialStatus - the starting status (0=Planned, 1=In Progress) Pre-condition: Input is a valid MusicAlbum object, initialStatus is 0 or 1. Post-condition: The music album is added to the library with the specified status.

    • addVideoGame

      public void addVideoGame(VideoGame input, int initialStatus)
      Adds a VideoGame to the library.
      Parameters:
      input - the VideoGame object to add
      initialStatus - the starting status (0=Planned, 1=In Progress) Pre-condition: Input is a valid VideoGame object, initialStatus is 0 or 1. Post-condition: The video game is added to the library with the specified status.

    • removeAnime

      public void removeAnime(Anime input)
      Removes an Anime from the library.
      Parameters:
      input - the Anime object to remove Pre-condition: Input is a valid Anime object present in the library. Post-condition: The anime is removed from the library.

    • removeTVSeries

      public void removeTVSeries(TVSeries input)
      Removes a TVSeries from the library.
      Parameters:
      input - the TVSeries object to remove Pre-condition: Input is a valid TVSeries object present in the library. Post-condition: The TV series is removed from the library.

    • removeMusicSingle

      public void removeMusicSingle(MusicSingle input)
      Removes a MusicSingle from the library.
      Parameters:
      input - the MusicSingle object to remove Pre-condition: Input is a valid MusicSingle object present in the library. Post-condition: The music single is removed from the library.

    • removeMusicAlbum

      public void removeMusicAlbum(MusicAlbum input)
      Removes a MusicAlbum from the library.
      Parameters:
      input - the MusicAlbum object to remove Pre-condition: Input is a valid MusicAlbum object present in the library. Post-condition: The music album is removed from the library.

    • removeVideoGame

      public void removeVideoGame(VideoGame input)
      Removes a VideoGame from the library.
      Parameters:
      input - the VideoGame object to remove Pre-condition: Input is a valid VideoGame object present in the library. Post-condition: The video game is removed from the library.

    • getAnimes

      public ArrayList<Anime> getAnimes()
      Retrieves the list of animes in the library.
      Returns:
      the list of Anime objects Pre-condition: The library has been initialized. Post-condition: The list of animes is returned.

    • getTVSeries

      public ArrayList<TVSeries> getTVSeries()
      Retrieves the list of TV series in the library.
      Returns:
      the list of TVSeries objects Pre-condition: The library has been initialized. Post-condition: The list of TV series is returned.

    • getMusicSingles

      public ArrayList<MusicSingle> getMusicSingles()
      Retrieves the list of music singles in the library.
      Returns:
      the list of MusicSingle objects Pre-condition: The library has been initialized. Post-condition: The list of music singles is returned.

    • getMusicAlbums

      public ArrayList<MusicAlbum> getMusicAlbums()
      Retrieves the list of music albums in the library.
      Returns:
      the list of MusicAlbum objects Pre-condition: The library has been initialized. Post-condition: The list of music albums is returned.

    • getVideoGames

      public ArrayList<VideoGame> getVideoGames()
      Retrieves the list of video games in the library.
      Returns:
      the list of VideoGame objects Pre-condition: The library has been initialized. Post-condition: The list of video games is returned.

    • getAnimeByTitle

      public Anime getAnimeByTitle(String title)
      Searches for an Anime by its title.
      Parameters:
      title - the title of the anime to search for
      Returns:
      the Anime object if found, otherwise null Pre-condition: The title is a valid string. Post-condition: The matching Anime object is returned, or null if not found.

    • getTVSeriesByTitle

      public TVSeries getTVSeriesByTitle(String title)
      Searches for a TVSeries by its title.
      Parameters:
      title - the title of the TV series to search for
      Returns:
      the TVSeries object if found, otherwise null Pre-condition: The title is a valid string. Post-condition: The matching TVSeries object is returned, or null if not found.

    • getVideoGameByTitle

      public VideoGame getVideoGameByTitle(String title)
      Searches for a VideoGame by its title.
      Parameters:
      title - the title of the video game to search for
      Returns:
      the VideoGame object if found, otherwise null Pre-condition: The title is a valid string. Post-condition: The matching VideoGame object is returned, or null if not found.

    • getMusicAlbumByTitle

      public MusicAlbum getMusicAlbumByTitle(String title)
      Searches for a MusicAlbum by its title.
      Parameters:
      title - the title of the music album to search for
      Returns:
      the MusicAlbum object if found, otherwise null Pre-condition: The title is a valid string. Post-condition: The matching MusicAlbum object is returned, or null if not found.

    • getMusicSingleByTitle

      public MusicSingle getMusicSingleByTitle(String title)
      Searches for a MusicSingle by its title.
      Parameters:
      title - the title of the music single to search for
      Returns:
      the MusicSingle object if found, otherwise null Pre-condition: The title is a valid string. Post-condition: The matching MusicSingle object is returned, or null if not found.

    • updateStatus

      public void updateStatus(String type, String mediaTitle, int newStatus)
      Finds a media entry by type and title, then updates its status.
      Parameters:
      type - the type of media to search for
      mediaTitle - the title of the media to update
      newStatus - the new status to set Pre-condition: The type and mediaTitle are valid strings, newStatus is a valid status integer. Post-condition: The status of the matching media entry is updated if found.

    • displayAllEntries

      public void displayAllEntries()
      Displays all entries across every media type. Pre-condition: The library has been initialized. Post-condition: All entries in the library are printed to the console.

    • filterByStatus

      public void filterByStatus(int status)
      Displays only entries that match the given status.
      Parameters:
      status - the status to filter by Pre-condition: The status is a valid status integer. Post-condition: All matching entries are printed to the console.

    • filterByType

      public void filterByType(String type)
      Displays only entries of the given media type.
      Parameters:
      type - the type of media to filter by Pre-condition: The type is a valid string. Post-condition: All matching entries are printed to the console.

    • displaySummary

      public void displaySummary()
      Prints a summary of library stats including counts and average rating. Pre-condition: The library has been initialized. Post-condition: A summary of the library is printed to the console.
